allow: PowerShell($temp = Join-Path $env:TEMP "miniz_preserve"; if \(Test-Path $temp\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $temp }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $temp | Out-Null; Move-Item -LiteralPath ".\\.claude" -Destination $temp; Move-Item -LiteralPath ".\\index.html" -Destination $temp; Write-Output "Moved to: $temp"; Get-ChildItem -Force -LiteralPath $temp | ForEach-Object { $_.Name })
